translations.definition: adj. 侵略性的、具攻擊性的、積極進取的

examples.en: The company launched an aggressive marketing campaign to gain market share before the launch of their new product line.

translations.zh-TW: 該公司在新產品線上市前發動了一場積極進取的行銷活動以搶占市占率。

examples.en: His negotiating style became more aggressive when the supplier refused to lower the unit price.

translations.zh-TW: 當供應商拒絕降低單價時，他的談判風格變得更具攻擊性。

examples.en: Of all the sales representatives, she was the most aggressive in chasing monthly targets.

translations.zh-TW: 在所有業務代表中，她是面對每月業績目標時最積極進取的一位。

examples.en: I received the invoice three weeks ago, but the client still hasn't transferred the payment.

translations.zh-TW: 我三週前就收到了發票，但客戶至今仍未匯款。

examples.en: Our branch office opened a few years ago in a rapidly growing business district.

translations.zh-TW: 我們的分公司幾年前在一個快速發展的商圈開幕。

examples.en: She joined the accounting department not long after the company was founded years ago.

translations.zh-TW: 公司在多年前成立後不久，她就加入了會計部門。

translations.definition: v. 同意、贊成、達成共識

examples.en: I fully agree with the proposal to extend the lease for another three years before the contract expires.

translations.zh-TW: 我完全同意在合約到期前將租約再延長三年的提案。

examples.en: The committee agreed to raise the quarterly budget after reviewing the updated financial report.

translations.zh-TW: 委員會在審閱最新的財務報告後，同意提高本季的預算。

examples.en: Both parties are currently agreeing on the delivery schedule for the remaining shipment next month.

translations.zh-TW: 雙方正就下個月剩餘貨物的交貨時間表達成共識。

examples.en: The manager asked the legal team to review the partnership agreement before signing it.

translations.zh-TW: 經理要求法務團隊在簽署前先審查這份合作協議。

examples.en: Several trade agreements between the two regions led to a significant drop in import tariffs.

translations.zh-TW: 兩個地區之間簽訂的數項貿易協議使進口關稅大幅下降。

examples.en: After three rounds of discussion, both sides finally reached an agreement on the revised payment terms and the new delivery dates.

translations.zh-TW: 經過三輪討論，雙方終於就修改後的付款條件與新的交貨日期達成協議。

translations.definition: adv. 在前面、向前、領先  adj. 前方的、預先的

examples.en: Our main competitor is still ahead in terms of total market share, but we are closing the gap quickly.

translations.zh-TW: 我們的主要競爭對手在總市占率上仍然領先，但我們正迅速縮小差距。

examples.en: Please plan ahead and submit all travel expense reports at least two weeks before the quarterly review.

translations.zh-TW: 請預先規劃，並在季度審查前至少兩週提交所有差旅費用報告。

examples.en: The project manager confirmed that the new system launch is well ahead of schedule thanks to the extra funding received last month.

translations.zh-TW: 專案經理確認，由於上個月獲得的額外資金，新系統的推出時間遠遠超前原定進度。

translations.definition: n. 援助、幫助、輔助工具  v. 援助、協助、有助於

examples.en: The government provided emergency financial aid to small businesses affected by the sudden economic downturn last quarter.

translations.zh-TW: 政府向上季受突如其來的經濟低迷影響的小型企業提供了緊急財務援助。

examples.en: The consulting firm aided the manufacturer in reducing production costs by nearly fifteen percent over six months.

translations.zh-TW: 這家顧問公司協助製造商在六個月內將生產成本降低了近百分之十五。

examples.en: By aiding local startups with mentorship and extra funding, the venture capital firm built a strong pipeline of future investment opportunities.

translations.zh-TW: 透過為本地新創公司提供指導與額外資金，這家創投公司建立了一條穩健的未來投資機會管道。

translations.definition: n. 目標、目的  v. 瞄準、致力於、旨在

examples.en: Our primary aim this fiscal year is to expand the customer base across three new overseas regions.

translations.zh-TW: 本會計年度我們的首要目標是在三個新的海外地區擴展客戶群。

examples.en: The marketing team aimed the new advertising campaign at young professionals living in major metropolitan areas of the country.

translations.zh-TW: 行銷團隊將新的廣告活動瞄準居住在該國主要都會區的年輕專業人士。

examples.en: By aiming to reduce carbon emissions by thirty percent before the end of next year, the company is positioning itself as an industry leader in sustainability.

translations.zh-TW: 公司旨在明年年底前減少百分之三十的碳排放，藉此將自己定位為產業中永續發展的領導者。

translations.definition: n. 空氣、氣氛、航空  v. 晾乾、通風、廣播

examples.en: The conference room felt tense due to the strict air of professionalism maintained throughout the contract negotiations today.

translations.zh-TW: 由於今日合約談判全程維持著嚴格的專業氣氛，會議室裡氣氛顯得緊繃。

examples.en: Management constantly puts on airs about the firm's financial stability even though several key clients have recently cut their orders by half.

translations.zh-TW: 管理階層不斷擺出公司財務穩健的架子，儘管幾個主要客戶最近已將訂單砍掉一半。

examples.en: After the heated board meeting, the chief executive asked everyone to step outside for some fresh air before resuming the discussion on the restructuring plan.

translations.zh-TW: 激烈的董事會會議之後，執行長要求所有人到外面呼吸一下新鮮空氣，再繼續討論重組計畫。

translations.definition: n. 航空器、飛機（單複數同形）

examples.en: The new passenger aircraft can carry up to three hundred travelers, making it the most fuel-efficient model in the airline's fleet.

translations.zh-TW: 這架新的客機最多可搭載三百名旅客，是該航空公司機隊中最省油的機型。

examples.en: Several private aircraft were parked on the tarmac, waiting for clearance before departing to the annual industry summit overseas.

translations.zh-TW: 好幾架私人飛機停在停機坪上，等待許可後飛往海外參加年度產業高峰會。

examples.en: The cargo aircraft delivered the medical supplies to the remote region overnight, ensuring the hospitals had enough equipment for the emergency response team.

translations.zh-TW: 貨機連夜將醫療物資運送到偏遠地區，確保醫院有足夠的設備供應給緊急應變小組。

examples.en: The new international airport is expected to handle over fifty million passengers per year once the final expansion phase is finished next June.

translations.zh-TW: 新的國際機場預計在明年六月最後一期擴建工程完成後，每年可處理超過五千萬人次的旅客。

examples.en: Several regional airports reported record passenger traffic during the holiday season, prompting the tourism board to plan additional shuttle services.

translations.zh-TW: 幾個區域性機場在假期間通報了破紀錄的旅客流量，促使觀光局規劃額外的接駁服務。

examples.en: Please arrive at the airport at least three hours before your international departure to allow enough time for check-in and security screening during peak travel season.

translations.zh-TW: 請於國際線班機起飛前至少三小時抵達機場，以便在旅遊尖峰時段有足夠時間辦理登機與安檢手續。
